title: Lead Investment Banker at Lodha & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Lodha & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha & Co:
Lodha & Co is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
